treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for further evaluation due to pneumonia and musculoskeletal chest pain.
Patient started on Doxycycline Hyclate, Cefpodoxime Proxetil, and Azithromycin.
Patient discharged with medication plan and follow-up instructions.

patient_outcome.final_status: Mental Status: Clear and coherent. Level of Consciousness: Alert and interactive. Activity Status: Ambulatory - Independent.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient advised to have son stay with him for safety and to be cleared by PCP.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Patient's chest pain is most likely musculoskeletal in nature.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient states cough was stable, chest pain unchanged and weakness unchanged.
